entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., a legume crop affected by drought stress

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Water stress occurring during the reproductive stage of the crop

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production, specifically seed yield in chickpea

entities.name: WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: The ability of the plant to conserve water during vegetative growth

entities.name: CANOPY CONDUCTIVITY
entities.description: The rate at which water vapor exits the plant canopy

entities.name: CANOPY SIZE AND DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The physical growth and extent of the plant canopy

entities.name: WATER LIMITED ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments where water availability is insufficient for optimal plant growth

entities.name: PLANT VIGOUR
entities.description: The overall health, growth rate, and robustness of the plant

entities.name: WATER SAVING TRAITS
entities.description: Traits that reduce water loss or optimize water use

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A population of homozygous lines derived from crossing two different parents

entities.name: HIGH THROUGHPUT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: Automated and rapid measurement of plant traits

entities.name: GENETIC MAPS
entities.description: A representation of the relative positions of genes or markers on a chromosome

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeats used as molecular markers

entities.name: SNP
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as molecular markers

entities.name: QTL IDENTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of finding genomic regions associated with a specific trait

entities.name: MAJOR QTL
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci that explain a significant portion of trait variation

entities.name: 3D-LEAF AREA
entities.description: A measure of the leaf surface area in three dimensions

entities.name: SHOOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the above-ground parts of the plant

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical distance from the soil surface to the highest point of the plant

entities.name: GROWTH RELATED TRAITS
entities.description: Various traits associated with the physical growth of the plant

entities.name: CALG04
entities.description: Linkage group 04 in the chickpea genome

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE QTL-HOTSPOT
entities.description: A genomic region containing multiple QTLs for drought tolerance

entities.name: CANOPY CONDUCTANCE
entities.description: The measure of water vapor transport through the canopy

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION RATE
entities.description: The rate at which water is evaporated from the plant leaves

entities.name: CALG03
entities.description: Linkage group 03 in the chickpea genome

entities.name: BIN MARKERS
entities.description: High-density markers used for fine mapping

entities.name: WATER STRESS ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of a plant to survive and produce yield under water deficit

entities.name: LYSIMETERS
entities.description: Devices used to measure the amount of water lost from soil through evaporation and transpiration

entities.name: FIELD
entities.description: The outdoor agricultural environment where crops are grown

entities.name: WATER STRESS TREATMENTS
entities.description: Controlled application of water deficit to plants

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The weight of seeds produced per plant or area
